title: [WIP] Update a cancelableReader importing gpg keys
body:
<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->


WIP PR cancelable reader and timeout go routine. we'd like to package a binary with these changes for the customer to test .

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6533**
